zh.lifeSummary: 當Sergeant Daniel Lester於1642年4月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特時，他的父親Andrew Lester26歲，母親Barbara Bradley22歲。他於1669年8月11日與Hannah Fox在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1716年1月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sergeant Daniel Lester于1642年4月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特时，他的父亲Andrew Lester26岁，母亲Barbara Bradley22岁。他于1669年8月11日与Hannah Fox在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1716年1月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Luster
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Lester  . This surname is common among African Americans.
German: habitational name for someone from any of the places called Lust (see   Lust   2).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): either an artificial extension of Lust 1 or from southern German Luster ‘chandelier’.

variants.name: Lasiter
meanings: English: variant of Lassiter (see Lester ).

variants.name: Lassiter
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Leicester (see   Lester  ). This name has been long established in North America, and occurs in a wide variety of forms.

variants.name: Lister
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lasseter
meanings: English: variant of Lassiter (see Lester ).

variants.name: Laseter
meanings: English: variant of Lassiter (see Lester ).

variants.name: Lasater
meanings: English: variant of Lassiter (see Lester ).

variants.name: Laster
meanings: English (East Anglia):
variant of   Lester  .
occupational name for a maker of cobblers’ lasts, from Middle English last, lest, the wooden form in the shape of a foot used for making or repairing shoes (Old English lǣste from lāst ‘footprint’).

variants.name: Leister
meanings: English: variant of   Lester  .
German: occupational name for a maker of lasts or a cobbler, from Middle High German leist + the agent suffix -er.

variants.name: Lassetter
meanings: English: variant of Lassiter (see Lester ).

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

variants.name: Danyal
meanings: Fanciful respelling of   Daniel .

en.lifeSummary: When Sergeant Daniel Lester was born on 16 April 1642, in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Andrew Lester, was 26 and his mother, Barbara Bradley, was 22. He married Hannah Fox on 11 August 1669, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 16 January 1716, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sergeant Daniel Lester est né le 16 avril 1642, à Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Andrew Lester, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Barbara Bradley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Fox le 11 août 1669, à New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1716, à New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans.

April 1642 in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Lester 26 und seine Mutter Barbara Bradley 22. Er hat am 11. August 1669 in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Fox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. it.lifeSummary: Quando Sergeant Daniel Lester è nato il il 16 aprile 1642 nel Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Andrew Lester, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Barbara Bradley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Fox il 11 agosto 1669, nel New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1716, nel New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sergeant Daniel Lesterが1642年4月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスグロウセスターで生まれた時，父Andrew Lesterは26歳，母Barbara Bradleyは22歳であった。1669年8月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンでHannah Foxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1716年1月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sergeant Daniel Lester(이)가 1642년 4월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Lester(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara Bradley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1669년 8월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 Hannah Fox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1716년 1월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sergeant Daniel Lester nasceu em 16 de abril de 1642, em Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Andrew Lester, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Bradley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Fox em 11 de agosto de 1669, em New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1716, em New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sergeant Daniel Lester родился 16 апреля 1642 г. в местности глоусестир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Andrew Lester было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Bradley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Fox 11 августа 1669 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1716 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sergeant Daniel Lester nació el 16 de abril de 1642, en Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Andrew Lester, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Barbara Bradley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hannah Fox el 11 de agosto de 1669, en New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1716, en New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años.
